headline: How Investors May Respond To ONEOK (OKE) Strong 2025 Earnings, Cautious 2026 Outlook And Ongoing Buybacks
summary: In late February 2026, ONEOK, Inc. reported fourth-quarter 2025 revenue of US$9,065 million and net income of US$977 million, alongside full-year 2025 revenue of US$33.63 billion and net income of US$3.39 billion, and issued 2026 guidance calling for net income between US$3.19 billion and US$3.71 billion and diluted EPS of US$5.04 to US$5.87. ONEOK also disclosed that it repurchased 451,346 shares for US$32 million in the fourth quarter of 2025, completing a total US$221.16 million buyback...
